title: PICUSim / Pediatric Critical Care Sim v3.2.0-public
description: v3.2.0 public package of PICUSim, an Apache-2.0 educational/research pediatric critical-care physiology simulation framework. Includes public-polish corrections for gas exchange, FiO2 persistence, short sepsis/pressor behavior, DKA and tension pneumothorax scenario fixes, public-package tests, validation documentation and safety limitations. Not for clinical use and not a medical device.
notes: Final metadata for the v3.2.0 public Zenodo new-version deposition. DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.20782468. OSF project: https://osf.io/etj8w/. Safety disclaimer must remain visible.
